sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106684" key="u(menai+ko\n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑμεναϊκὸν</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον,</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> - ̆̆ - <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">̆̆</itype>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Serv.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Centim.</title_> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.460</biblScope> </bibl> Keil).</entryFree>
